stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a major American multinational corporation engaged in the exploration, production, refining, marketing, and distribution of fossil fuels. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Chevron Corporation (CVX) is an American multinational corporation involved in the exploration, production, transportation, and marketing of hydrocarbons. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Neste Oy (NEE) is a Finnish company specializing in renewable fuels such as biofuels and aviation kerosene. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Shell plc (SHEL) is a British multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London, UK. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company based in London, UK. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
